design_philosophy: High-density, tactical 'Control Room' interface for professional Forex trading. Prioritizes data legibility, rapid execution, and visual hierarchy over decorative elements. Avoids soft aesthetics in favor of stark contrast and monospace precision.

rules: All numerical data MUST use tabular-nums utility for alignment during live updates.
Headings strictly use Barlow Condensed for a high-intensity, athletic/tactical feel.
Avoid using Inter or standard sans-serif; stick to the monospaced and condensed pairing.
Zero wasted space. The entire viewport (h-screen) should be utilized if possible (Dashboard format).
Panels strictly stick to rectangular grid items. Avoid jagged bottoms by using h-full flex-col on panel contents.
Never center-align data or forms; strict left-alignment or tabular column alignment.

surfaces_and_borders.shadows: none (use border contrasts instead of soft shadows to maintain tactical clarity)
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: FORBIDDEN. Refraction degrades data legibility. Use solid #141414.

components.strategy: Shadcn highly customized for density. Override padding and rounded utility classes.

specific_overrides.Button: rounded-sm uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-xs h-8 sm:h-9 px-3
specific_overrides.Input: rounded-sm border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] font-mono text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500
specific_overrides.Badge: rounded-none text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest px-1.5 py-0.5 border-white/20

animations.hover: Instant background lightening (bg-white/5). No scale transforms that cause layout shifts.
animations.data_update: Subtle text color flash (green/red) upon numerical change, fading back to white in 300ms.
animations.30s_timer: Smooth linear progress bar width reduction, turning yellow at 10s, red at 5s.
animations.kill_switch: Pulsing red border when armed, intense red overlay if triggered.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. Avoid Duotone to keep the terminal/tactical vibe crisp.

image_urls.description: Trader profile avatar for the top header.
Abstract dark geometric modern facade. Use as a very subtle background texture (opacity 5%) behind the app layout.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a grid-based dashboard using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 layout. This is a high-density 'Control Room'.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers and charts. Use Barlow Condensed for headings.
Implement real-time charts using recharts (styled to match the dark aesthetic).
Incorporate a 30-second event confirmation countdown using a progress bar.
Build a prominent 'Kill Switch' emergency stop button (Red #FF3B30).
Design panels for: Technical Indicators (SMA, ADX, RSI, Bollinger Bands), Trading Signals, Risk Management, Economic Calendar, and AI Analysis.
Include a system log and broker connection status (e.g., Dukascopy/IB status badges).
Do not use glassmorphism or soft shadows. Stick to flat, solid backgrounds (#141414 panels on #0A0A0A background) with 1px border-white/10.
Ensure all buttons and inputs are tightly packed with rounded-sm borders.
Use Tailwind's tabular-nums class on all rapidly changing forex prices to prevent jitter.
